description_long: This is a classic submachine gun with a sleek, elongated black metal body and a distinctive folding wire stock at the rear. The receiver is cylindrical and features a prominent magazine well beneath, with a vertical foregrip for improved handling. The barrel is relatively short and ends with a simple muzzle, while the iron sights are mounted along the top. The pistol grip is angled and textured for a secure hold, and the trigger guard is integrated into the lower assembly. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functionality and ease of use.
description: A black metal submachine gun with a folding wire stock, vertical foregrip, and iron sights, designed for practical use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow muzzle, front sight, and the alignment of the barrel and stock.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the folding wire stock, vertical foregrip, pistol grip, and the overall length of the rifle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wire stock's loop, the back of the receiver, and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with details of the magazine well and trigger area.
